title: Fix plot_sampling_frame TR-only compatibility
description: plot_sampling_frame currently dereferences sframe.TR before checking attribute existence, which can raise on sampling frames that expose only tr. Add safe fallback and regression test.
close_reason: Already implemented and validated: plot_sampling_frame handles tr-only sampling frames and regression test passes

title: Stabilize tests against joblib core-count warning
description: test_lowrank emits joblib/loky warning about unavailable physical core count on some environments. Add deterministic test-time setting (LOKY_MAX_CPU_COUNT) to suppress environment-specific warning.
close_reason: Completed: set LOKY_MAX_CPU_COUNT=1 in test fixture to suppress environment-specific loky warning

title: Remove scipy.misc.derivative dependency in HRF derivatives
description: fmrimod/hrf/derivatives.py imports scipy.misc.derivative, which emits deprecation warnings and will be removed in SciPy 2.0. Replace with internal finite-difference implementation and add regression test to ensure module import emits no scipy.misc deprecation warning.
close_reason: Completed: removed scipy.misc.derivative dependency and added import-warning regression test

title: SamplingFrame should accept legacy TR keyword
description: Parity tests fail because SamplingFrame.__init__ rejects legacy TR= keyword. Add regression test and implement alias handling (TR -> tr) with clear validation when both are provided.

title: Register rpy2 pytest marker to remove unknown-mark warnings
description: Full suite currently passes but emits PytestUnknownMarkWarning for @pytest.mark.rpy2. Add regression test for marker registration and update pytest.ini markers.
close_reason: Completed: added marker regression test and registered rpy2 marker in pytest.ini

title: Replace deprecated np.trapz in HRF decorator tests
description: pytest run still emits DeprecationWarning from tests/hrf/test_hrf_decorators.py using np.trapz. Switch to np.trapezoid in tests to keep CI warning-clean on newer NumPy.
close_reason: Completed: replaced np.trapz with np.trapezoid and validated test suite

title: Harden SamplingFrame tr/TR conflict and keep TR alias regression coverage
description: Close gap in SamplingFrame constructor around legacy TR alias by asserting conflict behavior and adding explicit sampling-frame tests for TR= usage plus mismatch rejection.
close_reason: Implemented and validated SamplingFrame TR alias test + conflicting tr/TR TypeError validation.

title: Fix SamplingFrame TR keyword compatibility
description: pytest currently fails in rpy2 parity tests because SamplingFrame no longer accepts uppercase TR keyword. Add compatibility test for TR alias and implement constructor support while preserving tr behavior.
close_reason: Validated TR/tr compatibility via targeted + full pytest run

title: Add regression test for pytest rpy2 marker registration
description: There are many @pytest.mark.rpy2 tests but pytest.ini does not declare the marker. Add a test that asserts registration and declare the marker in pytest.ini so unknown-mark warnings are eliminated.
close_reason: Already implemented and validated: pytest.ini declares rpy2 marker and tests/test_pytest_config.py passes

title: Fix rpy2 parity failures from SamplingFrame TR keyword mismatch
description: Running tests/design/test_rpy2_parity.py now fails with TypeError: SamplingFrame.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'TR'. Likely API mismatch between local fmrihrf and test assumptions.
close_reason: Resolved by TR/tr compatibility updates in tests/design/test_rpy2_parity.py and fmrimod/design/event_model.py
